channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street Light not working, 6th April
item.description:
Street light not working at night. The lamp remains off during hours of darkness, making the area poorly lit.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Crescent, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees fallen and large branches about to crash down, 6th April
item.description:
Due to strong winds Trees have fallen Large branches are about to fall crash down onto cars or onto someone's head It's on GOLDFINCH road and also the dual carriageway The fence is almost twisted and broken yet no responsibility made by Greenwich council Could the Greenwich council please take some initiative to fix this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple 10 inch pot holes in the middle of the road, 6th April
item.description:
The potholes are really long, it’s hard to avoid them and will cause significant damage to cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Lane, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road way towards Welling at junction of Sherwood road, 6th April
item.description:
Roadway worn, dangerous to bike users going to Welling
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long holes running across the road, 5th April
item.description:
The pothole is across the breadth of the road in line with the traffic lights. It has been present for a few months and had gotten noticeably worse over the past 4 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charterhouse Street, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report B - The pair of wooden benches fronting 165-7 High St, Beckenham near the junction with Village Way need cleaning and then an application of wood preservative, 5th April
item.description:
Report B - The pair of wooden benches fronting 165-7 High St, Beckenham near the junction with Village Way: (A) are dirty and need cleaning, and (B) need an application of wood preservative to stop them rotting. These benches are part of the circa 2018 £4.4m Beckenham Public Realm Improvement Scheme. If the have not been treated with wood preservative in 8 years they need to be now and cyclicly to keep them safe, in good appearance and to protect the investment of public money in them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report A - The two wooden benches either side of the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham need cleaning and treating with preservative. :, 5th April
item.description:
Report A - The two wooden benches either side of the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham: (A) are dirty and need cleaning, and (B) need an application of wood preservative to stop them rotting. These benches are part of the circa 2018 £4.4m Beckenham Public Realm Improvement Scheme. If the have not been treated with wood preservative in 8 years they need to be now and cyclicly to keep them safe, in good appearance and to protect the investment of public money in them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the big tree near the foot path is loads of rubbish, 5th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped loads of rubbish by the tree in the wooded area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Green Open Space, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loafd of general rubbish all over the grass areas, 5th April
item.description:
Absolutely disgusting there is rubbish all over the green areas you cant enjoy walking around as the waste is everywhere!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matress and lots of rubbish been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
From the 161 bus stop all the way up to dunkery road there is mattress, cardboard, general rubbish, cans , canister so much and saw a mouse as well this is disgusting and there is so much rubbish it's all over the paths by the houses as well.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A cabinet and drawers been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
This is just by the grass on ravensworth road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A sink cabinet been dumped, 5th April
item.description:
A big sink cabinet been dumped on grass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds at the foot of the two new saplings by the granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham., 5th April
item.description:
Weeds at the foot of the two new saplings by the granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham. I cannot tell whether the greenery in the planters are weeds or desirable plants, too. The planting must be kept low for road safety visibility to enter the busy High St, too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 of 2 The granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham are dirty and need cleaning., 5th April
item.description:
2 of 2 The granite planters / corner features at the jct of Kelsey Sq / Burnhill Rd and High St, Beckenham are dirty and need cleaning. These are also in the Beckenham Town Conservation Area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Square, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 of 2 Granite bench / corner feature at jct of Village Way and High St, Beckenham dirty and needs cleaning., 5th April
item.description:
1 of 2 Granite bench / corner feature at jct of Village Way and High St, Beckenham dirty and needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 240, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Criminal damage to Parking signs because times sprayed painted over, 5th April
item.description:
All these parking signs on Cherry garden street have been criminally damaged because they have all had the times sprayed painted over. This happened on Friday 3rd April 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-14, Perryn Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete cover, 5th April
item.description:
Virgin telecom concrete cover damaged Causing problems
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsonage Manorway, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress has been left blocking the pavement, 5th April
item.description:
Mattress has been abandoned blocking the pavement. Absolutely upsetting seeing this kind of uncivil behavior.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harton Close, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer / gym equipment, 5th April
item.description:
Fridge freezer / gym equipment

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Clothes dumped on green box, 5th April
item.description:
Clothes dumped on green box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
